MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Andrew Lambert is present.
Attorney, Susan Parkinson , appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Niomi Jenkins, is present.
Attorney, Kim Zeldin , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ray Erlach, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
